detail.description:
Authorized by Ragnarok Online, A Continuation of the Classic Adventure

Land of Snowflakes, the grand new expansion pack, has been launched. Beneath the Everlasting Primefrost whispers an elegy to a lost crown. The frozen land mirrors the glimmer of minds whose paths cross. Inside the abyssal furnace, an artificial heart pulses weakly. The Wind of Fate has arrived. Do you hear the call from another world?
 
Dive into Ragnarok M: Classic, a fair, shop-free adventure focused on gameplay! Zeny is t
detail.releaseNotes: A collab event between Ragnarok M and the anime [Uncle from Another World] is being launched. The event will last from May 14th to June 14th.
